notes: Redirects to Microsoft account login (login.live.com). Clean multi-step flow: email first, then password. Microsoft Fluent UI components. Minimal DOM noise. Possible 2FA step after password.

endpoints.label: Email/Phone/Skype Input
endpoints.description: Account identifier input field with Next button on first login step

endpoints.label: Password Input
endpoints.description: Password field with Sign In button on second login step

endpoints.label: Forgot Password
endpoints.description: Link to Microsoft account password reset flow

endpoints.label: Sign In with Passwordless
endpoints.description: Option to use Microsoft Authenticator app, Windows Hello, or security key instead of password

endpoints.label: Create Account
endpoints.description: Link to create a new Microsoft account
